text: Author: jkois Date: Tue Jun 26 21:45:19 2012 New Revision: 39132 URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/39132 Log: PR: www/167011 Add http://www.aspensystemsdirect.com/ to the list of hardware providers with FreeBSD support. Requested by: Chad Richards (chadr att aspsys dott com) Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.hardware.xml Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.hardware.xml ============================================================================== --- head/share/sgml/commercial.hardware.xml Tue Jun 26 20:48:04 2012 (r39131) +++ head/share/sgml/commercial.hardware.xml Tue Jun 26 21:45:19 2012 (r39132) @@ -114,6 +114,22 @@ + + Aspen Systems Direct + http://www.aspensystemsdirect.com/ + + Aspen Systems is based out of Wheat Ridge, CO and has been in + business for over 30 years offering customizable rackmount servers + and workstations featuring FreeBSD and other open source operating + systems. We also provide custom turn-key High Performance Computing + Clusters for government, universities, and corporations throughout + the world. Please contact a sales engineer today at 1-888-227-1286 or visit our website for more + information. + + + catpipe Systems http://www.catpipe.net/ _______________________________________________ svn-doc-all@freebsd.org mailing list http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-doc-all To unsubscribe, send any mail to "svn-doc-all-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"
